'''ât-g-r-j''' ('''katagrejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:teletransport|teletransport]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-g-r-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:teletransport|teletransport]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-g-r-j
|-
! Lemma
| katagrejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitagrejoko|thitagrejoko]] || [[word:jitagrejoko|jitagrejoko]] || [[word:shitagrejoko|shitagrejoko]] || [[word:kitagrejoko|kitagrejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutagrejoko|thuthutagrejoko]] || [[word:jujutagrejoko|jujutagrejoko]] || [[word:shushutagrejoko|shushutagrejoko]] || [[word:kukutagrejoko|kukutagrejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutagrejoko|thutagrejoko]] || [[word:jutagrejoko|jutagrejoko]] || [[word:shutagrejoko|shutagrejoko]] || [[word:kutagrejoko|kutagrejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutagrejoko|thutagrejoko]] || [[word:jutagrejoko|jutagrejoko]] || [[word:shutagrejoko|shutagrejoko]] || [[word:kutagrejoko|kutagrejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetagrejoko|thetagrejoko]] || [[word:jetagrejoko|jetagrejoko]] || [[word:shetagrejoko|shetagrejoko]] || [[word:ketagrejoko|ketagrejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotagrejoko|thothotagrejoko]] || [[word:jojotagrejoko|jojotagrejoko]] || [[word:shoshotagrejoko|shoshotagrejoko]] || [[word:kokotagrejoko|kokotagrejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotagrejoko|thotagrejoko]] || [[word:jotagrejoko|jotagrejoko]] || [[word:shotagrejoko|shotagrejoko]] || [[word:kotagrejoko|kotagrejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotagrejoko|thotagrejoko]] || [[word:jotagrejoko|jotagrejoko]] || [[word:shotagrejoko|shotagrejoko]] || [[word:kotagrejoko|kotagrejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtagrejoko|thĂŠtagrejoko]] || [[word:jĂŠtagrejoko|jĂŠtagrejoko]] || [[word:shĂŠtagrejoko|shĂŠtagrejoko]] || [[word:kĂŠtagrejoko|kĂŠtagrejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatagrejoko|thathatagrejoko]] || [[word:jajatagrejoko|jajatagrejoko]] || [[word:shashatagrejoko|shashatagrejoko]] || [[word:kakatagrejoko|kakatagrejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatagrejoko|thatagrejoko]] || [[word:jatagrejoko|jatagrejoko]] || [[word:shatagrejoko|shatagrejoko]] || [[word:katagrejoko|katagrejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatagrejoko|thatagrejoko]] || [[word:jatagrejoko|jatagrejoko]] || [[word:shatagrejoko|shatagrejoko]] || [[word:katagrejoko|katagrejoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
